TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tausa Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Tausa a niyaro', 12 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 592 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 578 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Seediq73%, Tayal10%, Amis2%, Bunun2%, Paiwan1%, Truku6%, roma5%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tao~u~usa itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u tao~u~usa a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u səəɬ~ɮi***%, tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, paiwan*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tausa Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Tausa a niyaro', 12 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 592 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 578 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Seediq73%, Tayal10%, Amis2%, Bunun2%, Paiwan1%, Truku6%, roma5%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tao~u~usa itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u tao~u~usa a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u səəɬ~ɮi***%, tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, paiwan*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
